Hey everyone, this is Russell Brunson, and
I’m so excited to be writing this newsletter.
About a year ago we launched our book
“DotComSecrets Labs: 108 Proven Split
Test Winners” where we had a chance to
share
tons of our best split tests with the
world. In the past year, we’ve sold well over
10,000 copies and watched as it has literally
changed hundreds of people’s businesses.
The
only problem with the book is that
the second it was printed, we had already
discovered new things that worked. And
for the past year, I haven’t been able to
share these cool discoveries anywhere! So
we decided to launch this mini monthly
newsletter where I’ll share two to three
of our cool tests each month
and give
you a script we use (along with a DVD or
CD explaining how to use it). I figure it’s
something that all of you marketing junkies
will love, and I’ll love putting together.
So, the first thing I want to share is a test
that was right in front of your eyes, and I
think that almost everyone missed it. In
fact, only
one person of the 10,000+ who
bought the DotComSecrets Labs book said
anything to me about it. Yet it was one of,
if not
the, most powerful tests we had this
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 8 --

2 | Issue No. 1
year. Here is what he saw:
Do you know what it is? When you purchased the book, you
probably saw it (as over a third of you bought it, ha ha...). But if
you don’t know or remember what it is, then you need to not
only keep buying my stuff (shameless plug J), but also start
watching the process I’m taking you through when you’re
buying. It’s something that allowed us to
finally be profitable
on
cold traffic coming to our front end offers. Brad saw it, and it
made him a fortune! Keep your eyes open and you’ll see great
marketing happening all around you! What he saw is something
I call “The Order Form Bump.” Let me show you how it works.
Step 1: Someone Comes To One Of My “Free
Plus Shipping” Or Front End Offers
On the page shown below we gave away our free book. You’ll
notice on this version of the page, we had a cool image that
visitors could click on and be taken to step one... We saw almost
Results are unique to this specific ClickFunnels user. Your results will vary based on your
effort, education, business model, and market factors beyond our control. We make no
earnings claims or return on investment claims, and you may not make your money back.

Step 3: The Order Form Bump

FRONT END REVENUE
Want our “Conversion
Krusher” Video Sales Letter template? It’s
one of our highest converting templates
and easy to install. Click YES to add this
to yiour order now for just $37! (This
offer is not available at ANY other time

-- 3 of 8 --

4 | Issue No. 1
0% improvement having this first block or not having it.
I thought it looked cool, so I kept it there, but on the new
versions of this page, we are not having this first image (so don’t
think you have to have it).
Step 2: We Asked For Their Shipping Address
We saw a lot of successful CPA marketers asking for the shipping
address on the first page and credit card information on the
second. It makes the purchase a lot less threatening, and
dramatically increased our conversions when we tested it. In
fact, as shocking as it might seem, in many of our tests we have
conversions on this first page that are as high or
higher than our
basic squeeze page! Yes, even though I’m asking for nine fields
of information, because they see the offer, and they just see the
shipping field, conversions stay very high!
The other awesome part of this two step process, is now that you
have their contact info, you can follow up with those who don’t
finish filling out step two and get them to finish their order.
After they fill out their shipping address, we ask them for their
credit card.
Step 3: The Order Form Bump
This is the page where all of the magic happens. Now, the
key to this is adding the bump
after they give us their credit
card. This is the bump. It’s the equivalent of the gum and
magazines you see when you walk out of the grocery store.
An impulse buy.
Here are a few things I found that really make this bump work:
1. 	The copy has to be
very short. Notice we only have four
sentences. If the copy is any longer than that, the end
user will have to “think” about it more, and that can not
only kill the bump sale, but can kill the initial sale as well.
2. 	The offer has to be something simple to understand (for
this offer it was a video sales letter template – it doesn’t
need any more explanation).
3. 	The offer can
only be available right here and right now
4. 	The price (at least for us) has to be under $50. We’ve had
success at $27, $37 and $47, but when I passed the $50
mark, the sales almost stopped completely.
Now, I’m sure you’re wondering what the results have been...
Brad commented that he had 35% of his front end customers
add his bump offer! The number for our DCS Labs offer was
almost identical. At the time of writing this newsletter, about
38% of people who buy the front end also take the $37 bump!
That means our front end revenue (
before upsells) went
from $9.95 to $24.01. Yes, we get an additional $14.06 from
every person who buys our free book
before they see any of
the real upsells!
Next for our DCS Labs offer we have a $197 upsell, and then a
$297 upsell. Here is a sketch of what our funnel looks like:
Our DCS Labs Funnel
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 8 --

DotComSecrets Labs | 7
You can see how Brad implemented the Order Form Bump
on pages five and six. They are using ClickBank for his
process, so he doesn’t ask for credit card information on
step two. Instead he gets their address, has people add the
bump, then takes them to his ClickBank order form (NOTE:
If they choose the bump, he changes which ClickBank order
form he takes them to).
Pretty cool, don’t you think?
You can also see how we used the concept when we launched
ClickFunnels on page six. Our conversion on this one wasn’t as
high as DCS Labs, but we were still able to get about 24% of
those who took our free trial into the bump offer.
Are you guys getting this? Do you see why it’s so powerful?
If you’re still struggling to understand, let me show you one
more diagram (below) that should help push you over the
edge. I call this “The Bump Test.” It should help sell you on the
concept of the OTO bump, but also help you to understand
why I use a lot of “Free Plus Shipping” offers.
Here’s how the bump test works.
1. 	I’ve found that by sending someone to a Free Plus
Shipping offer vs. a straight sale, I can usually get about
three times as many people to take the offer. Plus, a sales
video for F+S is about a hundred times easier to create
than a sales video for a $37 product.
otoBUMP	www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 7 of 8 --

knowledge acquired from this course will provide you with the ability to adapt to inevitable internet evolution. However, we cannot be held responsible for changes that may affect the
applicability of these techniques.

well as stated in any examples. If you rely upon any figures provided, you must accept the entire risk of not doing as well as the information provided.

2. 	I add in the order form bump, and on average we get
about one third of people to buy that product!
This means we have the
same front-end revenue (with a lot
less effort) going to the Free + Shipping offer
and we have
three times as many people who see our upsells!
I’m sure I’ll talk more in a future issue about Free Plus Shipping
Offers, but this order form bump is so awesome that I couldn’t
resist writing about it now!
So, how do you go about adding an order form bump to
your sales process? Well, if you’re using ClickFunnels, then
it’s simple. We are creating the ability to add bumps to order
pages now, and should be live by the time this goes to print.
If you’re not using ClickFunnels yet, it’s time to start moving
your funnels over (but only do this if you like money)... if not,
keep using whatever you’re using J. You can get your free
two week trial at www.ClickFunnels.com.
Thanks!
We have the same front-end revenue (with a lot less
effort) going to the Free + Shipping offer and we have
three times as many people who see our upsells!”
3xMORE PEOPLE TAKE
OUR F+S OFFERS COMPARED
TO A STRAIGHT SALE
